message:
chore(beads): re-close 25 beads clobbered by concurrent stale-DB flushes

Restores closed status for hjub/s5su/1749/o4su/6y8p/ds9o/pfo5/eud6/1b89/
gz9f/ufar/ozj0/k2lp/9jl4/lxda/m17o/v8s5/qi6z/6zk9 and cod-owned closes
04mo/t3xa/19ic/a118/qx7p/f3pv/rdeg that were silently reverted when a
concurrent br close flushed the stale shared SQLite DB to JSONL. See
feedback_br_sync_drift.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
